mapper.select: /* CouponMapper.getAdminCouponDetail: 관리자 쿠폰 상세 조회 */ SELECT CB.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_STAT_CD , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_DOWN_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_DOWN_END_DT , CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB , CB.CPN_USABLE_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_USE_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_USE_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_USE_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_USE_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_USE_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_USE_END_DT , CB.CPN_DOWN_ABLE_YN , CASE WHEN CB.STAT_STOP_DT IS NULL OR CB.STAT_STOP_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.STAT_STOP_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS STAT_STOP_DT FROM COUPON_BASE CB WHERE CB.CPN_NO = #{cpnNo} AND IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'

/* CouponMapper.getAdminCouponApplyGoodsTargetList: 관리자 쿠폰 상품 적용 대상 조회 */ SELECT CT.TARGET_GB_CD , CT.TARGET_VALUE , CT.TARGET_VALUE AS GOODS_ID , GB.GOODS_NM , GB.ERP_STYLE_CD , CONCAT('[', CT.TARGET_VALUE, '] ', IFNULL(GB.GOODS_NM, '')) AS TARGET_NM FROM COUPON_TARGET CT LEFT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = CT.TARGET_VALUE WHERE CT.CPN_NO = #{cpnNo} AND CT.TARGET_GB_CD = 'TARGET_GB_01' ORDER BY CT.TARGET_VALUE ASC

/* CouponMapper.getAdminCouponApplyExhibitionTargetList: 관리자 쿠폰 기획전 적용 대상 조회 */ SELECT CT.TARGET_GB_CD , CT.TARGET_VALUE , EB.EXHIBITION_NO , EB.EXHIBITION_NM , CONCAT('[', CT.TARGET_VALUE, '] ', IFNULL(EB.EXHIBITION_NM, '')) AS TARGET_NM FROM COUPON_TARGET CT LEFT JOIN EXHIBITION_BASE EB ON EB.EXHIBITION_NO = CAST(CT.TARGET_VALUE AS UNSIGNED) AND IFNULL(EB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' WHERE CT.CPN_NO = #{cpnNo} AND CT.TARGET_GB_CD = 'TARGET_GB_01' ORDER BY CT.TARGET_VALUE ASC

/* CouponMapper.getAdminCouponApplyCategoryTargetList: 관리자 쿠폰 카테고리 적용 대상 조회 */ SELECT CT.TARGET_GB_CD , CT.TARGET_VALUE , C.CATEGORY_ID , C.CATEGORY_NM , C.CATEGORY_LEVEL , CONCAT('[', CT.TARGET_VALUE, '] ', IFNULL(C.CATEGORY_NM, '')) AS TARGET_NM FROM COUPON_TARGET CT LEFT JOIN CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = CT.TARGET_VALUE WHERE CT.CPN_NO = #{cpnNo} AND CT.TARGET_GB_CD = 'TARGET_GB_01' ORDER BY CT.TARGET_VALUE ASC

/* CouponMapper.getAdminCouponExcludeGoodsTargetList: 관리자 쿠폰 상품 제외 대상 조회 */ SELECT CT.TARGET_GB_CD , CT.TARGET_VALUE , CT.TARGET_VALUE AS GOODS_ID , GB.GOODS_NM , GB.ERP_STYLE_CD , CONCAT('[', CT.TARGET_VALUE, '] ', IFNULL(GB.GOODS_NM, '')) AS TARGET_NM FROM COUPON_TARGET CT LEFT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = CT.TARGET_VALUE WHERE CT.CPN_NO = #{cpnNo} AND CT.TARGET_GB_CD = 'TARGET_GB_02' ORDER BY CT.TARGET_VALUE ASC
